magnitude_note: 5pp exemption off the 40% company income tax for NEB-conforming equity restructuring; offered annually from YA1980 (NEP industrial/equity policy)

act_label: Promotion of Investments Act 1986 (Pioneer Status / ITA framework)
magnitude_note: Enabling reform: Pioneer Status (income-tax exemption ~100% of statutory income, 5 yr) and Investment Tax Allowance framework; replaced the Investment Incentives Act 1968
Labuan Offshore Business Activity Tax Act 1990: offshore-trading companies taxed at 3% of net audited profit OR a fixed RM20,000; IOFC launched 1 Oct 1990
Reinvestment Allowance raised from 40% to 50% of qualifying capital expenditure to encourage modernization/automation

act_label: MSC / Multimedia Super Corridor status incentives
magnitude_note: MSC-status companies: Pioneer Status with 100% income-tax exemption on statutory income for 5 yr (extendable to 10) under the Bill of Guarantees
Sectoral income-tax exemption for biomass/renewable-energy ('fifth fuel') generating companies under the Eighth Malaysia Plan
Iskandar Development Region: tax exemptions for IDR-status companies in approved nodes plus strategic investment fund; flagship southern economic corridor announced Budget 2007
Income-tax exemption on additional capital cost of obtaining GBI certification + stamp-duty exemption for GBI-certified building buyers; green-technology financing scheme

act_label: KLIFD / Tun Razak Exchange financial-district incentives (Budget 2012)
magnitude_note: KLIFD-status companies: 100% income-tax exemption for 10 yr + stamp-duty exemption on loan/service agreements; 70% exemption for 5 yr for KLIFD property developers; ITA/ACA for Marquee Status

Angel-investor incentive: deduction up to RM500,000 of qualifying investment in tech start-ups against aggregate income (Budget 2013); venture-capital company tax incentives folded in (Budget 2003/2010)
Enhancement of the existing Principal Hub incentive: concessionary income-tax rate of 10% on overall statutory income from Principal Hub activities for 5 yr
Relocation incentive introduced under PENJANA (Jun 2020) / Budget 2021: 0% tax for new manufacturing companies (10-15 yr) and 10% for existing companies (5 yr), or 100% Investment Tax Allowance
Preferential income-tax rate of 0-10% for the first 10 yr and 10% for the subsequent 10 yr for pharmaceutical (incl. COVID-19 vaccine) manufacturers
Extension of the relocation incentive and the 15% concessionary rate for non-resident C-Suite until 2024; E&E and aerospace income-tax incentives / ITA extended to 31 Dec 2025
Full import-duty exemption on EV components, full excise-duty + sales-tax exemption on locally-assembled CKD EVs (extended to 31 Dec 2027); road-tax exemption for EVs
